title: Task 53
prompt:
```
premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric morning light, in soft sunrays, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expressive animated 3D eyes of all characters, realistic textures, true depth of field, focus on the foreground characters and objects with shallow cinematic 3d depth of field, detailed clear emotional staging, high-quality 4K animated movie look.

CHARACTER LOCKS:
@image1 = Aisha, 16-year-old human princess, initially startled and surprised, then thoughtful, then a subtle spark of mischievous rebellion.
@image2 = Dora, white panther with golden collar — normal panther size, her height reaches an adult human's hip, initially startled, then exhibiting a royal lazy attitude and dismissive expression.
@image3 = Altair Royal Hawk, in comical distress, wings flapping awkwardly and frantically, feathers ruffled, delivering a scroll, then darting away quickly.

LOCATION REFERENCE:
@image4 = Palace exterior — the internal courtyard viewed from Aisha's royal balcony, showing ornate arabesque architecture, lush green gardens, and the bustling activity of the palace below. The architecture, lighting, and scale must remain 100% unchanged.

PROPS REFERENCE:
@image5 = Rolled scroll, ancient parchment appearance, clutched in Altair's talons.

SCENE: Morning scene — a light, refreshing breeze, soft sunrays filtering through the palace. Altair the Royal Hawk frantically delivers an urgent message to Aisha and Dora on the vast royal balcony, then quickly darts away, leaving them in a moment of stunned silence. Dora expresses her typical pragmatic and dismissive attitude about "royal business," while Aisha's initial shock quickly gives way to a dawning, mischievous idea and a glint of rebellion in her eyes.

Create 2x2 cinematic grid with 4 panels with 3d animated scenes in each one:

Panel 1: Medium shot. Altair the Royal Hawk is mid-air, center-left, wings flapping frantically and awkwardly, clutching a rolled scroll in his talons. He's hovering just in front of Aisha, who stands on the left side of the balcony, looking up with a surprised expression. Dora the white panther sits on the right side of the balcony, beside Aisha, startled but with a hint of annoyance, looking towards Altair. The ornate arabesque balcony railing is in the foreground, and the palace courtyard is visible in the background under soft morning light.

Panel 2: Tight two-shot. Aisha is on the left, and Dora the white panther is on the right, both looking at each other with wide, stunned eyes. Altair has just darted away, leaving a sense of lingering surprise. Aisha’s mouth is slightly agape, while Dora's ears are slightly flattened, conveying disbelief. The balcony railing is in the very soft foreground, and the palace courtyard is a blurred background. Morning light bathes their faces.

Panel 3: Medium shot, Over-the-shoulder (OTS) of Dora. Dora the white panther is in the foreground, facing away from the camera and towards the balcony railing, her posture dismissive. Her head is turned slightly back towards Aisha (who is visible in the mid-ground, center-right), looking at her with a royal lazy, 'I told you so' expression, eyes slightly rolled. Aisha is seen with a thoughtful, almost pondering look, beginning to process what just happened. The detailed balcony railing is prominent, with the courtyard in soft focus behind Aisha.

Panel 4: Close-up on Aisha's face. Her eyes are narrowed slightly, a subtle, mischievous smile playing on her lips, hinting at a newly formed idea. Her expression conveys a spark of rebellion and determination. A hint of her headscarf dances in a light breeze. The background is a very shallow depth of field blur of the palace courtyard, catching soft morning light, emphasizing her focused expression.

Environment: A grand, expansive royal balcony with an intricately carved arabesque railing, overlooking a bustling and beautiful internal palace courtyard. The courtyard features lush gardens, elegant fountains, and pathways, all framed by the ornate, sun-drenched palace architecture. A gentle morning breeze drifts across the balcony, carrying the faint sounds of the waking palace. Soft sunrays pierce through the air, highlighting faint dust motes.

All panels must be consistent between each other as to the backgrounds, positioning and characters as one beat-to-beat story. Style: premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric morning light, in soft sunrays, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expressive animated 3D eyes of all characters, realistic textures, true depth of field, focus on the foreground characters and objects with shallow cinematic 3d depth of field, detailed clear emotional staging, high-quality 4K animated movie look.
```

---

**CLI Command for Generation:**

To run this prompt and get all three model outputs in a 2x2 grid format, assuming the prompt text is saved as `aisha_balcony_hawk_scene.txt` and your image references are in the `assets/` directory:

```bash
npx pixverse create image \
  --prompt "$(cat aisha_balcony_hawk_scene.txt)" \
  --model nano-banana-2 \
  --quality 2160p \
  --aspect-ratio 16:9 \
  --grid "2x2" \
  --image assets/characters/aisha.png \
  --image assets/characters/dora_panther.png \
  --image assets/characters/altair_hawk.png \
  --image assets/locations/palace-exterior.png \
  --image assets/props/scroll.png \
  --json
```
